name: Smoked Sausage Primavera
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Uncooked spaghetti, broken in half
8 oz Eckrich Smoked Sausage, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
2. Place sausage, vegetables and water in a 10-inch skillet.
3. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 7-8 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
5. Add milk, margarine and Italian seasoning to skillet.
6. Heat to melt the margarine.
7. Toss sausage mixture with spaghetti and Parmesan cheese.
8. Let stand 5 minutes to thicken.
